message:
test(bocpd): add 28 unit tests for BOCPD regime detector

Covers: BocpdConfig responsive/aggressive_coalesce presets, with_logging
builder, BocpdRegime as_str/Display/Default/Clone/Eq, BocpdDetector
default impl/config accessor/run_length_posterior accessor/initial
expected_run_length/last_evidence initially none, set_decision_context
updates/noop, evidence_jsonl disabled/enabled/null optional fields/
with decision context, decision_log_jsonl disabled/no evidence,
BocpdEvidence Display format/clone, recommended_delay exact thresholds/
midpoint, reset clears last_event_time, first event uses steady default,
observation clamping, config/detector clone+debug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
